description_long: This is a modern grave structure composed primarily of polished stone, featuring a two-tone headstone with a vertical split between a dark black and a light gray marble section. The headstone is mounted at the rear of a rectangular grave plot, which is bordered by a thick, light gray stone frame. The grave cover itself is a raised, rectangular slab of matching light gray marble, slightly elevated above the surrounding base. The headstone includes engraved inscriptions and a small cross symbol, adding a solemn and respectful touch. The overall design is geometric and contemporary, with clean lines and a solid, substantial appearance. The materials and craftsmanship suggest durability and a sense of permanence.
description: A modern grave with a split black and gray marble headstone, raised gray marble slab, and engraved inscriptions, all set within a thick stone border.
description_view_0: Front view showing the split black and gray marble headstone and the thick stone border.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the grave slab and the thickness of the headstone.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engraved inscriptions and cross on the headstone, as well as the layered grave cover.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the layered structure of the grave and the headstone's profile.
